glm-flash.notes: incumbent; llama-server on the rig. repeat_penalty 1.0 is deliberate: op JSON repeats keys and handles by design (glm4.7-flash.md).

qwen3.5-9b.notes: floor cell (roster: ~8-9B, any laptop). Raw mode expected near zero; scored separately per cross-model.md. repeat_penalty 1.0 deliberate.
